{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Diamond Veins elixir
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Diamond Veins elixir]] is an elixir that can make madra channels pure and resilient as a [[diamond]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"It’s called a Diamond Veins elixir," the voice went on, "You have to cycle it a little at a time over the next three days, but it’s said to make your madra channels as pure and resilient as a diamond."<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
